if (target.getAttribute('data-cmp') == 'settings') {
event.preventDefault();
target = null;
if (typeof AppHelper !== 'undefined') {
AppHelper.openConsentLayer();

return;
}
target = target.parentElement;

}, false);

<div class="hidden-print alert__wrapper" style=""></div>
<div class="main-header"><div class="headline_small"><div><img src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/images/graphics/ic_64_holiday_sick.svg" alt=""></div>Alle an Bord?</div><div class="subline">Aktuell sind 5 Personen abwesend</div><div class="bg hidden-print"></div></div>
<div class="wrap">
<div class="container">
<div id="modal" class="classic-modal hidden-print modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">

</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="absence-index">

<ul id="absence" class="nav nav-tabs"><li class="active"><a href="#absence-tab0" data-toggle="tab">Aktuell</a></li>

<div class="tab-content"><div id="absence-tab0" class="tab-pane active"><div class="content">
<button type="button" class="button-add" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#w2"><i id="w1" class="fa-plus sp fa-fw fa-xs" style="color: #FFFFFF;"></i><div class="button-label">Abwesenheit eintragen</div></button>
<div id="w2" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w0" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i><h3>Wähle eine Abwesenheitsart</h3>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">

<div>
<p class="text-center hidden-xs">
Abhängig von der Art des Termins stehen dir unterschiedliche Funktionen und Eingabemöglichkeiten zur Verfügung. </p>
</div>
<div class="modal-box-selection text-center">
<a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=1"><i id="w3" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-holiday sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Urlaub</b></p><i id="w4" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=2"><i id="w5" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-sick sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Krank/Verletzt</b></p><i id="w6" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=3"><i id="w7" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-inactive sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Inaktiv</b></p><i id="w8" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=5" style="margin-right: 0;"><i id="w9" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-partial sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>1 Tag/Woche</b></p><i id="w10" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><div class="modal-box-selection text-center"><a class="modal-box-selection-item long" href="/absence/create?type=4"> <i id="w11" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon visible-xs fa-other sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Sonstige</b></p><i id="w12" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a></div></div>


</div>

<div id="absence-tab1" class="tab-pane"><div class="content">
<button type="button" class="button-add" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#w17"><i id="w16" class="fa-plus sp fa-fw fa-xs" style="color: #FFFFFF;"></i><div class="button-label">Abwesenheit eintragen</div></button>
<div id="w17" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w15" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i><h3>Wähle eine Abwesenheitsart</h3>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">

<div>
<p class="text-center hidden-xs">
Abhängig von der Art des Termins stehen dir unterschiedliche Funktionen und Eingabemöglichkeiten zur Verfügung. </p>
</div>
<div class="modal-box-selection text-center">
<a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=1"><i id="w18" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-holiday sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Urlaub</b></p><i id="w19" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=2"><i id="w20" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-sick sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Krank/Verletzt</b></p><i id="w21" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=3"><i id="w22" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-inactive sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Inaktiv</b></p><i id="w23" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=5" style="margin-right: 0;"><i id="w24" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-partial sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>1 Tag/Woche</b></p><i id="w25" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><div class="modal-box-selection text-center"><a class="modal-box-selection-item long" href="/absence/create?type=4"> <i id="w26" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon visible-xs fa-other sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Sonstige</b></p><i id="w27" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a></div></div>


</div>

</div>
</div>

<div id="absence-tab2" class="tab-pane"><div class="content">
<button type="button" class="button-add" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#w48"><i id="w47" class="fa-plus sp fa-fw fa-xs" style="color: #FFFFFF;"></i><div class="button-label">Abwesenheit eintragen</div></button>
<div id="w48" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w46" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i><h3>Wähle eine Abwesenheitsart</h3>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">

<div>
<p class="text-center hidden-xs">
Abhängig von der Art des Termins stehen dir unterschiedliche Funktionen und Eingabemöglichkeiten zur Verfügung. </p>
</div>
<div class="modal-box-selection text-center">
<a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=1"><i id="w49" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-holiday sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Urlaub</b></p><i id="w50" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=2"><i id="w51" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-sick sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Krank/Verletzt</b></p><i id="w52" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=3"><i id="w53" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-inactive sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Inaktiv</b></p><i id="w54" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=5" style="margin-right: 0;"><i id="w55" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-partial sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>1 Tag/Woche</b></p><i id="w56" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><div class="modal-box-selection text-center"><a class="modal-box-selection-item long" href="/absence/create?type=4"> <i id="w57" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon visible-xs fa-other sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Sonstige</b></p><i id="w58" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a></div></div>


</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<button type="button" class="button-add" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#w63"><i id="w62" class="fa-plus sp fa-fw fa-xs" style="color: #FFFFFF;"></i><div class="button-label">Abwesenheit eintragen</div></button>
<div id="w63" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w61" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i><h3>Wähle eine Abwesenheitsart</h3>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">

<div>
<p class="text-center hidden-xs">
Abhängig von der Art des Termins stehen dir unterschiedliche Funktionen und Eingabemöglichkeiten zur Verfügung. </p>
</div>
<div class="modal-box-selection text-center">
<a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=1"><i id="w64" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-holiday sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Urlaub</b></p><i id="w65" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=2"><i id="w66" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-sick sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Krank/Verletzt</b></p><i id="w67" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=3"><i id="w68" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-inactive sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Inaktiv</b></p><i id="w69" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=5" style="margin-right: 0;"><i id="w70" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-partial sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>1 Tag/Woche</b></p><i id="w71" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><div class="modal-box-selection text-center"><a class="modal-box-selection-item long" href="/absence/create?type=4"> <i id="w72" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon visible-xs fa-other sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Sonstige</b></p><i id="w73" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a></div></div>


</div>

<button type="button" class="button-add" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#w91"><i id="w90" class="fa-plus sp fa-fw fa-xs" style="color: #FFFFFF;"></i><div class="button-label">Abwesenheit eintragen</div></button>
<div id="w91" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w89" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i><h3>Wähle eine Abwesenheitsart</h3>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">

<div>
<p class="text-center hidden-xs">
Abhängig von der Art des Termins stehen dir unterschiedliche Funktionen und Eingabemöglichkeiten zur Verfügung. </p>
</div>
<div class="modal-box-selection text-center">
<a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=1"><i id="w92" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-holiday sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Urlaub</b></p><i id="w93" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=2"><i id="w94" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-sick sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Krank/Verletzt</b></p><i id="w95" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=3"><i id="w96" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-inactive sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Inaktiv</b></p><i id="w97" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><a class="modal-box-selection-item" href="/absence/create?type=5" style="margin-right: 0;"><i id="w98" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon fa-absence-partial sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>1 Tag/Woche</b></p><i id="w99" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a><div class="modal-box-selection text-center"><a class="modal-box-selection-item long" href="/absence/create?type=4"> <i id="w100" class="modal-box-selection-item-icon visible-xs fa-other sp fa-fw fa-2x" style="color: #000000;"></i> <p class="black"><b>Sonstige</b></p><i id="w101" class="visible-xs fa-drilldown sp fa-sm" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i></a></div></div>


</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="list">
<div class="front-page-placeholder"><div class="front-page-placeholder-label">Es liegen keine Abwesenheiten in dieser Kategorie vor.</div></div></div>
</div></div></div>
<br/>
</div>

<div id="premium-required-modal" class="classic-modal modal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
<div class="modal-dialog ">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-hidden="true">&times;</button>
<i id="w116" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">
<div class="modal-icon-headline">
<div class="card-head">
<img src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/images/graphics/ic_premium_stars.svg" alt=""> <h1>Premium erforderlich</h1>
<p>
Um diese Funktion nutzen zu können, benötigt dein Team eine Premium-Mitgliedschaft. Bitte kontaktiere deinen Trainer für weitere Informationen. </p>
</div>
</div><div class="row"><div class="col-sm-6 col-xs-12"><a class="btn btn-success" href="/premium/onboarding/index?type=team">Mehr erfahren</a><br><br></div><div class="col-sm-6 col-xs-12"><button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" data-dismiss="modal">Abbrechen</button></div></div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<div id="body-bottom-space"></div>

<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/221616789bd48cad43993f8313512b9cff0e/js/regular.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/221616789bd48cad43993f8313512b9cff0e/js/solid.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/221616789bd48cad43993f8313512b9cff0e/js/sp.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/221616789bd48cad43993f8313512b9cff0e/js/fontawesome.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/221616789bd48cad43993f8313512b9cff0e/js/v4-shims.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.7.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/twitter-bootstrap/3.4.1/js/bootstrap.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216d26fedeecc916f63121ea763ece3d03f/yii.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216d26fedeecc916f63121ea763ece3d03f/yii.activeForm.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/jquery.autosize.3.0.18.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/jquery.mobile-events.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/app-helper.js?v=39"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/app-interface.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/scroll.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/modernizr-custom.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/collapse.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/slick.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/form-input-label.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/phone-hide-show.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/beforeunload.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/select.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/js/spielerplus.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216988dff878389e14175753bb8b3670bcb/js/iap.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216884620d33ee797db2d9fc9c6fe465b78/swagger-client.browser.min.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216884620d33ee797db2d9fc9c6fe465b78/event-center.js"></script>
<script src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216509ddf4dc807f2215a07c7c633bf74e7/jquery.pjax.js"></script>
<script>
function onVisible(element, callback) {
new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if(entry.intersectionRatio > 0) {
callback(element);
observer.disconnect();
}
});
}).observe(element);
}

var firebaseParams = {"screen_class":"app-frontend/absence","screen_name":"absence/index"};

//Send actual screen
AppHelper.trackFirebaseEvent('screen_view', firebaseParams);
//Discover Modal view
var modals = document.getElementsByClassName('classic-modal');
for (var i=0; i<modals.length; i++) {
onVisible(modals[i], function(e) {
let modalTitle = e.querySelector('.modal-header h3');
if (modalTitle !== null) {
var modalName = modalTitle.innerText;
}
let eventParams = {
sp_modal: modalName || 'notset'
};
AppHelper.trackFirebaseEvent('screen_view', {...eventParams, ...firebaseParams});
});
}

//Discover premium features
var receivedPremiumEvents = [];
document.addEventListener('premium.feature.replaced', function(e) {
if (!receivedPremiumEvents.includes(e.detail.name)) {
let eventParams = {
sp_name: e.detail.name,
sp_type: e.detail.type
};
AppHelper.trackFirebaseEvent('premium_feature', {...eventParams, ...firebaseParams});
receivedPremiumEvents.push(e.detail.name);
}
});
document.addEventListener('premium.feature.cta.click', function(e) {
let eventParams = {
sp_name: e.detail.name,
sp_type: e.detail.type
};
AppHelper.trackFirebaseEvent('premium_feature', {...eventParams, ...firebaseParams});
});

//Click on an element that has data-ga attribute (or its parent)
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
var gaData = getGaData(e.target);
if (gaData !== false) {
var eventParams = {
sp_name: gaData,
sp_type: "cta_click"
};
AppHelper.trackFirebaseEvent('webview_user_engagement', {...eventParams, ...firebaseParams});
}
});

function getGaData(target) {
var element = target;
var attribute = 'data-ga';
var value = false;
if (typeof element == 'undefined' || element == null) {
return value;
}
while(true) {
if (element != document && element.hasAttribute(attribute)) {
value = element.getAttribute(attribute);
break;
} else {
if (element.parentNode) {
element = element.parentNode;
} else {
break;
}
}
};
return value;
}

document.addEventListener('ad.banner.enable', function() {
document.body.classList.add('ads--enabled');
});

document.addEventListener('ad.banner.disable', function() {
document.body.classList.remove('ads--enabled');
});

document.addEventListener('ad.consent.accepted', function() {
var backfillElements = document.querySelectorAll('.adsCPGBackfill');
backfillElements.forEach(function(backfillElement) {
backfillElement.style.display = 'none';
});
});

document.addEventListener('ad.consent.declined', function() {
var backfillElements = document.querySelectorAll('.adsCPGBackfill');
backfillElements.forEach(function(backfillElement) {
backfillElement.style.display = 'block';
});
});

if (typeof __cmp === 'undefined') {
console.log('checkWebViewAdConsent: __cmp not available');
document.dispatchEvent(new Event('ad.consent.declined'));
}
function exportConsent() {
if (typeof __cmp !== 'undefined') {
console.log("Exporting consent");
return __cmp('exportConsent');
}
}


function getCMPData() {
if (typeof __cmp !== 'undefined') {
console.log("CMP data requested");
return __cmp('getCMPData');
}
}
function importConsent(consentInfo) {
if (typeof __cmp !== 'undefined' && consentInfo != "") {
console.log("Importing consent");
console.log(consentInfo);
return __cmp('importConsent', consentInfo);
}
}
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('permission_manage_team', '0');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('sporttype', 'handball');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('team_gender', 'men');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('premium_customer', 'team');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('notification_preferences', 'PEve,PCha,PCoa,PNew,MNew');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('age', '');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('is_logged_in', '1');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('is_deputy', '0');
AppHelper.setFirebaseUProperty('user_permissions', 'VApp');
$( document ).on('click', '.btnOpenModal_event-center-modal', function( event ) {
// local variables
owner = $(this);
myModal = $('#event-center-modal');
titleDiv = $('#event-center-modal'+'_title');
contentDiv = $('#event-center-modal'+'_content');

// clear title / header when modal opens
titleDiv.empty();

// show loading animation while actual content is beeing loaded
myModal.modal('show').find(contentDiv).html('<div class="modal-loading"><img src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/images/graphics/ic_64_loading.png" alt=""><div class="modal-loading-title">Inhalt wird geladen ...</div></div>');

// if the element opening the modal is a link;
// prevent default action (opening the href attribute)
if (owner.is('a')) {
event.preventDefault();
}

// attach back button for mobile and title; if attribute was set
titleDiv.append('<i id="w102" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i>');
//myModal.find('.modal-header').append('');

if (owner.attr('data-modal-title')) {
titleDiv.append('<h3>' + owner.attr('data-modal-title') + '</h3>');
}

// load main-content into the modal
if (owner.attr('data-modal-action')) {
myModal.find(contentDiv).load(owner.attr('data-modal-action'), function( response, status, xhr ) {
// handle error responses
if (status == 'error') {
// TODO: design received json error
// RESPONSE EXAMPLE:
// {"name":"Forbidden","message":"Bearbeiten nicht möglich, da diese Strafe bereits einem Spieler zugewiesen wurde.","code":0,"status":403,"type":"yii\web\ForbiddenHttpException"}
resp = $.parseJSON(response);
myModal.find(contentDiv).html(resp.message);
}

// response successfull;
// check if additional elements are needed in modal header
// if yes; add them to the header div
if (status == 'success') {
// load custom div into header
addToHeader = owner.attr('data-modal-header-add');
if (!addToHeader) {
addToHeader = $('.modal-header-add');
}
buttons = myModal.find(contentDiv).find(addToHeader);
titleDiv.append(buttons);

// get and register a client script on load
// $.getScript("phpassets"+"/js/form-input-label.js");

// trigger event to execute code after modal has been loaded
myModal.trigger('easyModal.load.complete');
}
});
} else if (owner.attr('data-modal-content')){
myModal.find(contentDiv).html(owner.attr('data-modal-content'));

// trigger event to execute code after modal has been loaded
myModal.trigger('easyModal.load.complete');
}

// set footer
// not working for now
// $('#modal').find('#modalFooter').load($(this).attr('value')+' #modalFooterContent');
});

// Fix bootstrap modal bug
// https://stackoverflow.com/a/31283732
$( document ).on('shown.bs.modal', function() {
$("body.modal-open").removeAttr("style");
});
// shared javascript code between all easyModals
// CONFIGURE AND INITIALIZE EVENT CENTER
eventCenter.configure({
api: {
definitions: "https://api.spielerplus.de/eventcenter/definition/swagger.json",
},
query: {
expireIn: "1209600",
history: "1775927054",
token_prefix: "user:3961124:"
},
badges: {
showBadges: "true",
showCounter: true
}
});

// GET BADGES AND REGISTER UI EVENTS
eventCenter.badges.get()
let navigationBagdes = $('.dashboard__tiles');
navigationBagdes.on('click', '.ec-badge', function (event) {
eventCenter.badges.delete(event)
})
let centerData = {};
// get events for given category
eventCenter.resp.getByCategory("11", 'eventCenter.data.available')
// when data is available, show bell, activate user interface
$( document ).on('eventCenter.data.available', function (event, eventData) {
centerData = eventData;
eventCenter.resp.data = eventData;
if (eventCenter.storage.isOutdated()) {
eventCenter.badges.bell()
}
})
// trigger necessary events when easy modal has completed content loading
$('#event-center-modal').on('easyModal.load.complete', function () {
eventCenter.resp.data = centerData;
$(eventCenter.ui.pjaxContainerId).hide()
$(eventCenter.ui.loaderId).show()
// remember when modal was opened
eventCenter.storage.setLastOpened()
eventCenter.badges.hideBell()
let config = {
url: '/notification/default/ajax-index',
push: false,
replace: false
}
eventCenter.ui.pjaxReloader(config)
});
let spBadge = {
badge: $('.badge'),
get: function (identifier) {
this.badge = $('.spBadge_' + identifier);
return this;
},
setType: function (newClass) {
let cssClasses = [
'badge-primary',
'badge-info',
'badge-warning',
'badge-success',
'badge-danger'
];
for (let item of cssClasses) {
this.badge.removeClass(item);
}
this.badge.addClass(newClass);
return this;
},
setDataAttribute: function(name, value) {
this.badge.attr(name, value)
return this;
},
setContent: function (newContent) {
this.badge.html(newContent);
return this;
},
hide: function () {
this.badge.fadeOut(500);
return this;
},
show: function() {
this.badge.fadeIn(500);
return this;
}
}
const navGroups = {"events":[2,"11",3],"team":[4,"7","7","7","9","14"],"communication":["5","6","12",15],"profile":[16,17]};
const currentUser = 3961124;
eventCenter.resp.getByCategory("1", 'eventCenter.data.navigation'); // 1 = navigation

// TRIGGERS EVERYTIME USER DATA HAS BEEN RECEIVED
$(document).on('eventCenter.data.navigation', function (event, eventData) {
const events = eventData.events;

// loop trough navigation groups
for (var group in navGroups) {
if (!navGroups.hasOwnProperty(group)) {
return;
}
// get actors for current group
let categories = navGroups[group];
let badgeActors = categories.map(function(number) {
return 'badge:' + number;
});

// look for relevant actors inside the events
let totalCount = 0;
events.forEach(badgeEvent => {
if (!badgeActors.includes(badgeEvent.actor)) {
return;
}
const count = eventCenter.badges.count(badgeEvent);
totalCount = totalCount + count;
})
// determine the user id to which the counter belongs
if (events.length > 0) {
const eventKey = events[0].event_key;
const user = eventKey.split('{').pop().split('}')[0];
const userId = user.split(':')[1];

// set badge active
if (totalCount > 0 && userId == currentUser) {
spBadge.get('badge_' + group).setContent(totalCount).show();
}
}
}
});
$( document ).on('click', '.btnOpenModal', function( event ) {
// local variables
owner = $(this);
myModal = $('#modal');
titleDiv = $('#modal'+'_title');
contentDiv = $('#modal'+'_content');

// clear title / header when modal opens
titleDiv.empty();

// show loading animation while actual content is beeing loaded
myModal.modal('show').find(contentDiv).html('<div class="modal-loading"><img src="//assets.spielerplus.de/assets/2216030f617f5eeb2b358ca0259b447a7600/images/graphics/ic_64_loading.png" alt=""><div class="modal-loading-title">Inhalt wird geladen ...</div></div>');

// if the element opening the modal is a link;
// prevent default action (opening the href attribute)
if (owner.is('a')) {
event.preventDefault();
}

// attach back button for mobile and title; if attribute was set
titleDiv.append('<i id="w112" class="arrow-back visible-xs fa-arrow-large-left sp fa-fw fa-lg" data-dismiss="modal" style="color: #A8A8A8;"></i>');
//myModal.find('.modal-header').append('');

if (owner.attr('data-modal-title')) {
titleDiv.append('<h3>' + owner.attr('data-modal-title') + '</h3>');
}

// load main-content into the modal
if (owner.attr('data-modal-action')) {
myModal.find(contentDiv).load(owner.attr('data-modal-action'), function( response, status, xhr ) {
// handle error responses
if (status == 'error') {
// TODO: design received json error
// RESPONSE EXAMPLE:
// {"name":"Forbidden","message":"Bearbeiten nicht möglich, da diese Strafe bereits einem Spieler zugewiesen wurde.","code":0,"status":403,"type":"yii\web\ForbiddenHttpException"}
resp = $.parseJSON(response);
myModal.find(contentDiv).html(resp.message);
}

// response successfull;
// check if additional elements are needed in modal header
// if yes; add them to the header div
if (status == 'success') {
// load custom div into header
addToHeader = owner.attr('data-modal-header-add');
if (!addToHeader) {
addToHeader = $('.modal-header-add');
}
buttons = myModal.find(contentDiv).find(addToHeader);
titleDiv.append(buttons);

// get and register a client script on load
// $.getScript("phpassets"+"/js/form-input-label.js");

// trigger event to execute code after modal has been loaded
myModal.trigger('easyModal.load.complete');
}
});
} else if (owner.attr('data-modal-content')){
myModal.find(contentDiv).html(owner.attr('data-modal-content'));

// trigger event to execute code after modal has been loaded
myModal.trigger('easyModal.load.complete');
}

// set footer
// not working for now
// $('#modal').find('#modalFooter').load($(this).attr('value')+' #modalFooterContent');
});

// Fix bootstrap modal bug
// https://stackoverflow.com/a/31283732
$( document ).on('shown.bs.modal', function() {
$("body.modal-open").removeAttr("style");
});
function scrollToSmoothly(pos, time) {
var currentPos = window.pageYOffset;
var start = null;
if(time == null) time = 500;
pos = +pos, time = +time;
window.requestAnimationFrame(function step(currentTime) {
start = !start ? currentTime : start;
var progress = currentTime - start;
if (currentPos < pos) {
window.scrollTo(0, ((pos - currentPos) * progress / time) + currentPos);
} else {
window.scrollTo(0, currentPos - ((currentPos - pos) * progress / time));
}
if (progress < time) {
window.requestAnimationFrame(step);
} else {
window.scrollTo(0, pos);
}
});
}</script>
<script>jQuery(function ($) {
jQuery('#w2').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#w17').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#w48').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#w63').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#w76').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#w91').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#absence').tab();
jQuery('#event-center-modal').modal({"show":false});
window.setTimeout(function() {
$('.alert-fade').fadeTo(1000, 0, function(){
$(this).remove();
});
}, 5000);
jQuery('#modal').modal({"show":false});
jQuery('#premium-required-modal').modal({"show":false});
});</script></body>

</html>
